name: Chinese Chicken Wings
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons Prepared mustard (the Asian, kind not Frenches)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine soy, mustard, ginger, sugar and garlic in a bowl, stirring well.
2. Pour the mixture over the chicken wings and toss to coat evenly.
3. Cover and refrigerate overnight.
4. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
5. Bake for 1 hour or grill on charcoal at serving time.
